heading: Congressional oversight
label: 3313 Congressional oversight
notes: Effective DateSection effective as of , see , set out as a note under .January 1, 1979section 18 of Pub. L. 96–8section 3301 of this title

children.heading: Monitoring activities of Senate Foreign Relations Committee, House Foreign Affairs Committee, and other Congressional committees
children.label: a Monitoring activities of Senate Foreign Relations Committee, House Foreign Affairs Committee, and other Congressional committees

children.text: the implementation of the provisions of this chapter;
the operation and procedures of the Institute;
the legal and technical aspects of the continuing relationship between the United States and Taiwan; and
the implementation of the policies of the United States concerning security and cooperation in East Asia.

children.heading: Committee reports to their respective Houses
children.label: b Committee reports to their respective Houses
children.text: Such committees shall report, as appropriate, to their respective Houses on the results of their monitoring.
